relationships.description: ISO 24028 Trustworthiness in AI maps to NIST AI RMF GOVERN 1. Both establish foundational governance principles for trustworthy AI systems.
ISO 24028 Transparency maps to NIST AI RMF GOVERN 2. Both address transparency and accountability in AI governance.
ISO 24028 Explainability relates to XAI DataOps model explainability. Both address making AI decision processes understandable to stakeholders.
ISO 24028 Data-related threats relate to MITRE ATLAS Reconnaissance. Both address adversarial threats to AI systems through data manipulation.
ISO 24028 Safety relates to ISO 23894 Best available information. Safety assessment depends on having the best available information about AI system risks.
ISO 24028 Security maps to ISO 27001 Technological controls. Both address protection of systems against unauthorized access and manipulation.
ISO 24028 Privacy relates to GDPR Principles. Both address protection of personal data, with ISO 24028 focusing on AI-specific privacy risks.
ISO 24028 Audit and certification supports ISO 42001 Performance evaluation requirements for AI management systems.
ISO 24028 Resiliency relates to NIST CSF Protect function. Both address maintaining system functions under adverse conditions.
ISO 24028 Bias assessment and mitigation supports EU AI Act high-risk system requirements for non-discrimination and fairness.
ISO 24028 Human oversight mechanisms maps to EU AI Act human oversight requirements. Both require meaningful human control over high-risk AI systems.
ISO 24028 AI system lifecycle considerations relate to ISO 42005 Impact Assessment Process. Both address trustworthiness across the full AI lifecycle.
ISO 24028 Monitoring and maintenance implements ISO 31000 Monitoring and review for AI-specific trustworthiness monitoring in production.
ISO 24028 Testing and validation supports ISO 23894 AI Risk Management Process by providing concrete testing approaches for AI risk assessment.
ISO 24028 Controllability supports ISO 42001 Operation requirements by providing guidance on maintaining human control over AI system operations.
